meaning: n.(利用生物材料通过生物变化过程将有机废料、太阳能等转化为新形式的)生物转化
examples: Official Name: Bioconversion of Carbon Dioxide to Biofuels by Facultatively Autotrophic Hydrogen bacteria.
The new therapy included inhibition of apoptosis, carrier therapy, convection transport, different biotin bioconversion etc.
The reaction conditions of bioconversion for manufacturing fructose 1, 6 diphosphate (FDP) have been studied by using free yeast cells.
